query:
SELECT
            (payload->>'fetch_to_ack_ms')::float8 AS "value!",
            EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - ts_coided))::bigint AS "age_secs!: i64"
        FROM core.events
        WHERE source = 'sinex.event_engine'
          AND event_type = 'batch.stats'
        ORDER BY id DESC
        LIMIT 1
